slides.description: LIAM Groupe mobilizes Central African women and youth through sports, entrepreneurship, community gastronomy, and training for sustainable impact in the heart of Bangui.
G-Fitness promotes health and well-being through sports, with programs tailored for women and youth in Bangui.
O'GAB creates economic opportunities for women while celebrating the gastronomy and local products of Central Africa.
Practical, job-oriented training programs to give Central African youth the keys to employment and success.
Become a partner or sponsor of LIAM Groupe and associate your image with concrete actions that change lives in the Central African Republic.

domains.title: Our 6 areas of intervention
domains.description: Concrete programs to meet the needs of Central African communities, with a focus on empowering women and youth.

joinCTA.description: Become a partner or sponsor of LIAM Groupe and associate your image with concrete actions that change lives in the Central African Republic.

about.intro1: Founded in 2015 in Bangui, LIAM Groupe is a Central African non-governmental organization working for sustainable community development through social innovation, sports, female entrepreneurship, and culture.
about.intro2: Our name embodies three core values: <1>Innovation</1> in our approaches, <2>Ambition</2> in our goals, and <3>Mission</3> in our unwavering commitment to Central African youth and women.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.text: A Central Africa where every woman and young person has the tools to thrive and actively contribute to national development.

missionBlock.title: Our mission
missionBlock.text: To mobilize, train, and support Central African women and youth through concrete programs in six complementary areas of intervention.

stats.title: LIAM Groupe by the numbers
stats.description: Since our founding, we work every day for concrete and measurable impact within Central African communities.

team.title: The faces of LIAM Groupe
team.description: A passionate and determined team that puts its expertise at the service of the Central African community.

contact.title: Stay in touch
contact.intro: Our team is based in Bangui and available to discuss your projects, partnership ideas, or any questions about our programs.
contact.socialText: Stay informed about our news and events.
